mapper.select: SELECT t.nx_DO_dis_goods_id AS nxDoDisGoodsId, t.nx_DO_quantity AS nxDoQuantity, t.nx_DO_apply_date AS nxDoApplyDate, t.nx_DO_standard AS nxDoStandard FROM ( SELECT nx_DO_dis_goods_id, nx_DO_quantity, nx_DO_apply_date, nx_DO_standard, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY nx_DO_dis_goods_id ORDER BY nx_DO_apply_date DESC ) AS rn FROM nx_department_order_history WHERE nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} AND nx_DO_dis_goods_id = #{gid} AND nx_DO_arrive_Date > #{dayuDate} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT nx_DO_apply_date AS date, SUM(nx_DO_quantity) AS qty FROM nx_department_order_history WHERE nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} AND nx_DO_dis_goods_id = #{gid} AND nx_DO_apply_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL #{windowDays} DAY GROUP BY nx_DO_apply_date ORDER BY DATE(nx_DO_apply_date) DESC

SELECT nx_DO_dis_goods_id FROM nx_department_order_history WHERE nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} AND nx_DO_apply_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL #{windowDays} DAY GROUP BY nx_DO_dis_goods_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minTimes} order by nx_DO_dis_goods_id

SELECT DISTINCT h.nx_DO_dis_goods_id FROM nongxinle.nx_department_order_history h INNER JOIN nx_distributer_goods g ON h.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = g.nx_distributer_goods_id INNER JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods f ON g.nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id = f.nx_distributer_father_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods gf ON f.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = gf.nx_distributer_father_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods ggf ON gf.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = ggf.nx_distributer_father_goods_id WHERE h.nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} AND h.nx_DO_apply_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{windowDays} DAY) GROUP BY h.nx_DO_dis_goods_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minTimes} ORDER BY COALESCE(ggf.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, 0), COALESCE(gf.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, 0), COALESCE(f.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, 0)
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT h.nx_DO_dis_goods_id FROM nx_department_order_history h INNER JOIN nx_distributer_goods g ON h.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = g.nx_distributer_goods_id INNER JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods f ON g.nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id = f.nx_distributer_father_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods gf ON f.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = gf.nx_distributer_father_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods ggf ON gf.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = ggf.nx_distributer_father_goods_id WHERE h.nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} AND h.nx_DO_apply_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{windowDays} DAY) GROUP BY h.nx_DO_dis_goods_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minTimes} ) t
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_department_order_history where nx_department_orders_id in
#{nxDepartmentOrdersId}
